title: Anika 60340 Pack of 3 Self Adhesive Square Mirrors 20cm / Versatile and Functional / Easy to Install / Sleek and Modern(Packaging May Vary), White
features: 3PK SELF-ADHESIVE SQUARE MIRRORS – This 3 pack of square mirrors are ideal to enhance any room in your home including entryways, living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms and more.

VERSATILE AND FUNCTIONAL – Use these mirrors in any room in your house to instantly reflect the light to make a room appear brighter and bigger. Each square mirror measures at 20cm so they are compact enough to fit in small spaces while ensuring you can see yourself clearly.
EASY TO INSTALL – These self-adhesive mirrors could not be easier to install, simply apply to any clean, dry surface and watch how they transform your space.

SLEEK AND MODERN – The sleek and modern mirror design fits in with a wide variety of interiors so you can feel confident that they will nicely complement your space. Place them individually or as a set of 3 for an instant home improvement.
ANIKA – Anika is the leading manufacturer of homeware, bathroom and kitchen essentials. View the Anika store on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: From the manufacturer Set of 3 Self-Adhesive Square Mirrors These mirrors allow you to place them where ever you need providing the surface is dry and clean. You can either place them as a set of 3, or separate them throughout your house. Each mirror measures at 20cm in width to ensure you can fully see yourself in it. The mirrors also come in different sizes and shapes.
